mapper.select:
SELECT ep.equipment_process_id AS equipmentProcessId, ep.factory_line_id AS factoryLineId, fl.factory_line_code AS factoryLineCode, fl.factory_line_name AS factoryLineName, ep.equipment_process_code AS equipmentProcessCode, ep.equipment_process_name AS equipmentProcessName FROM equipment_process ep INNER JOIN factory_line fl ON ep.factory_line_id = fl.factory_line_id WHERE ep.is_deleted = false AND fl.is_deleted = false
AND ep.factory_line_id = #{request.factoryLineId}
AND ( ep.equipment_process_code LIKE CONCAT('%', #{request.keyword}, '%') OR ep.equipment_process_name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{request.keyword}, '%') )
ORDER BY ep.equipment_process_id DESC

SELECT ep.equipment_process_id AS equipmentProcessId, ep.factory_line_id AS factoryLineId, fl.factory_line_code AS factoryLineCode, fl.factory_line_name AS factoryLineName, ep.equipment_process_code AS equipmentProcessCode, ep.equipment_process_name AS equipmentProcessName FROM equipment_process ep INNER JOIN factory_line fl ON ep.factory_line_id = fl.factory_line_id WHERE ep.equipment_process_id = #{equipmentProcessId} AND ep.is_deleted = false AND fl.is_deleted = false
SELECT equipment_process_id FROM equipment_process WHERE equipment_process_code = #{equipmentProcessCode} AND is_deleted = false LIMIT 1
